narrative:
Crawford County has 27,207 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.3% of registrants.
